configuration.description: Settings that apply to this contract line
configuration.fixedInfo: Fixed contract lines bill a flat recurring fee regardless of individual service rates.

configuration.title: Contract Line Configuration
configuration.usageInfo: Usage-based contract lines are configured per service with unit rates.

cadenceOwner.description: Sets the default cadence owner applied to recurring lines created in this wizard.
cadenceOwner.label: Recurring Cadence Default

client.description: Use the client billing calendar so recurring lines stay aligned with the client’s normal invoice cadence.
client.label: Invoice on client billing schedule

contract.description: Use contract-anniversary service periods for recurring lines that should follow the contract timeline.

client.chooseClientHint: Choose the client this contract is for.

contractName.hint: Give this contract a descriptive name.
contractName.label: Contract Name
contractName.placeholder: e.g., Standard MSP Services, Premium Support Package

currency.hint: Currency for this contract. Defaults to the client's preferred currency.
currency.label: Currency

dates.endDateAfterStartValidation: End date must be after start date
dates.endDateOngoingHint: Leave blank for an ongoing contract.
dates.endDateTooltip: Leave blank for ongoing contracts that don't have a fixed end date. You can always set an end date later when the contract is terminated or expires.
dates.startDateHint: When does this contract become active?

wizardBasics.description: Choose a template (optional), select the client, and set foundational contract details. Service details load in the next steps.
wizardBasics.heading: Contract Basics

po.amountHint: Total authorized amount on the purchase order.
po.noteText: PO enforcement will apply when invoice automation is enabled. Configure now to stay ahead.
po.requireHint: Block invoice generation if PO is not provided.
po.requireTooltip: When enabled, invoices cannot be generated for this contract unless a PO number is provided.
po.title: Purchase Order (Optional)

evergreen.description: This contract is ongoing. Configure annual review cadence and notice timing.
evergreen.title: Evergreen Review Settings

fixedTerm.description: This contract has a fixed end date. Configure renewal behavior and notice timing.
fixedTerm.title: Renewal Settings

renewal.useTenantDefaultsDescription: Apply organization-level renewal settings unless explicitly overridden.

template.prefillHint: Prefill services, notes, and billing cadence from an existing template. You can still adjust everything before publishing.

baseRate.hint: Total recurring fee for all fixed services combined.
baseRate.label: Recurring Base Rate

wizardFixed.description: Configure services that are billed at a fixed rate each billing cycle. You can still track time, but billing is based on this flat amount.
wizardFixed.emptyState: No fixed fee services added yet. Click “Add Service” above or “Skip” to move on.

explainer.description: These services have a set recurring price. You'll still track time entries for these services, but billing is based on the fixed rate, not hours worked.
explainer.title: What are Fixed Fee Services?

wizardFixed.heading: Fixed Fee Services

proration.label: Adjust for Partial Periods
proration.tooltip: Adjust the recurring fee when contract dates cover only part of a service period.

wizardProducts.description: Attach products that will be billed each cycle. Products use the catalog price for the contract currency unless you enter an override.
wizardProducts.emptyState: No products attached yet. Add a product if you want it to bill every cycle.
wizardProducts.heading: Products

validation.noDefaultPriceEnterUnitPrice: No default price set. Enter a unit price.
validation.productMissingPrice: This product has no default price and no override. It cannot be billed until you enter a unit price.

wizardHourly.description: Configure services that are billed based on time tracked. Perfect for T&M (Time & Materials) work.
wizardHourly.emptyState: No hourly services added yet. Click “Add Hourly Service” above or “Skip” if you don’t need time & materials billing.

explainer.description: These services are billed based on actual time tracked. Each time entry will be multiplied by the hourly rate to calculate the invoice amount.
explainer.title: What are Hourly Services?

wizardHourly.heading: Hourly Services

minimumBillableTime.hint: e.g., 15 minutes - any time entry less than this will be rounded up
minimumBillableTime.label: Minimum Billable Time (minutes)

roundUpToNearest.hint: e.g., 15 minutes - time entries will be rounded up to the nearest interval
roundUpToNearest.label: Round Up To Nearest (minutes)

wizardUsage.description: Configure services that are billed based on usage or consumption. Perfect for metered services like data transfer, API calls, or storage.
wizardUsage.emptyState: No usage-based services added yet. Click “Add Usage-Based Service” above or “Skip” if you don’t need consumption billing.

explainer.description: These services are billed based on actual consumption or usage metrics. Each unit consumed will be multiplied by the unit rate to calculate the invoice amount.
explainer.title: What are Usage-Based Services?

wizardUsage.heading: Usage-Based Services

labels.unitOfMeasureHint: Choose the unit this service bills on.

wizardReview.heading: Review Contract
wizardReview.description: Review all contract details before creating. You can still edit after creation if needed.

contract.advance: First invoice: bill on the contract anniversary window that opens the first covered service period.
contract.arrears: First invoice: bill on the next contract anniversary window after the first covered service period closes.

client.advance: First invoice: bill on the first client billing schedule window covering the service period.
client.arrears: First invoice: bill on the next client billing schedule window after the first covered service period closes.

partialPeriod.enabled: Partial periods adjust the recurring fee to the covered portion of the service period.
partialPeriod.disabled: Partial periods keep the full recurring fee even when contract dates land inside a service period.

summary.contract: If you save this recurring line, future periods would materialize on an anniversary-style preview anchored to the 8th before invoice generation.
summary.client: If you save this recurring line, future periods would materialize on the client billing schedule preview before invoice generation.

total.title: Estimated Monthly Total
total.description: Fixed charges only. Hourly and usage services bill separately based on actual usage.

finalChecklist.title: Before you finish:
finalChecklist.itemRates: Double-check all rates, quantities, and buckets
finalChecklist.itemDates: Verify the start and end dates
finalChecklist.itemEditLater: Remember: you can edit the contract later if needed

validation.duplicateNameExists: A template with this name already exists
validation.templateNameAlreadyInUse: Template name is already in use
validation.atLeastOneServiceRequired: At least one service is required
validation.unsupportedRecurringAuthoringCombination: Unsupported recurring authoring combination for {{lineType}} services: contract anniversary cadence currently supports {{supportedFrequencies}} billing frequencies. {{billingFrequency}} is not supported yet. Use one of the supported frequencies or invoice on the client billing schedule instead.

templateBasics.heading: Template Basics
templateBasics.description: Name this contract template and capture high-level guidance. Pricing and client specifics will be finalized when the template is applied to a client.

placeholders.templateName: Managed Services Starter, Premium Support Bundle, etc.
placeholders.internalNotes: Describe where this template applies, onboarding tips, or approval requirements.

help.templateName: Use a descriptive name so teams can quickly identify the right template.
help.internalNotes: These notes stay with the template to provide context when teammates use it.
help.billingFrequency: Sets the default cadence when the template is applied. It can still be adjusted per client.

templateFixed.heading: Fixed Fee Services
templateFixed.description: Configure services that are billed at a fixed rate each billing cycle. You can still track time, but billing is based on this flat amount.

info.title: What are Fixed Fee Services?
info.description: These services have a set recurring price. You'll still track time entries for these services, but billing is based on the fixed rate, not hours worked.

cadenceOwner.label: Cadence Owner
cadenceOwner.help: Choose which schedule should define recurring service periods for contracts created from this template.

client.label: Invoice on client billing schedule
client.description: Use the client billing calendar so contracts created from this template stay aligned with the client billing cadence.

contract.label: Invoice on contract anniversary
contract.description: Use this contract line anniversary schedule. Contract cadence currently supports monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, and annual recurring billing.

billingTiming.arrears: Arrears - invoice after the period closes
billingTiming.advance: Advance - invoice at the start of the period

help.adjustPartialPeriods: Use this when contracts created from the template should scale the recurring fee if service starts or ends inside a period.

templateProducts.heading: Products
templateProducts.description: Attach products to the template. When a contract is created from this template, products will be billed each cycle using the product catalog price for the contract currency.

templateHourly.heading: Hourly Services
templateHourly.description: Select services that are billed based on time tracked. Rates will be determined by the service's pricing in the client's currency when the contract is created.

info.title: What are Hourly Services?
info.description: These services are billed based on actual time tracked. Each time entry is multiplied by the service's hourly rate to calculate the invoice amount.

rounding.heading: Time Rounding Settings
rounding.minimumBillableTimeHelp: Example: 15 minutes. Any time entry below this threshold is rounded up.
rounding.roundUpToNearestHelp: Example: 15 minutes. Time entries are rounded up to the nearest interval.

templateUsage.heading: Usage-Based Services
templateUsage.description: Select services that are billed based on usage or consumption. Rates will be determined by the service's pricing in the client's currency when the contract is created.

info.title: What are Usage-Based Services?
info.description: These services are billed based on actual consumption or usage metrics. Each unit consumed is multiplied by the service's unit rate to calculate the invoice amount.

help.unitOfMeasure: Override the default unit of measure for this service.

templateReview.heading: Review Template
templateReview.description: Confirm the template contents. Rates are determined by each service's pricing in the client's currency when a contract is created from this template.

removeDialog.title: Remove Contract Line Preset
removeDialog.message: Are you sure you want to remove "{{serviceName}}" from "{{presetName}}"? This will remove all other services associated with this contract line preset as well.
